column1: # ESP32-S3 16MB partition table candidate A for DEV-002
# Purpose: expand OTA app slots to 4MB each while keeping 100KB NVS
# Status: approved candidate for DEV-002 verification.
# Reserved gap 0x24000-0x2FFFF keeps app0 on a 0x10000 boundary.
# Reserved gap 0xE30000-0xFDFFFF is left for future expansion.
